I combine remote sensing, machine learning, and field research to translate environmental data into actionable policy and technology — from zero-tillage adoption in India to methane forecasting in Vietnam.

Academic research

Research projects

Geospatial · ML · Sustainable Ag

Zero-tillage adoption across 200,000 Indian villages

Analyzed high-resolution (10m) spatial data across ~200,000 villages in the Indo-Gangetic Plains to identify regional climate-driven adoption patterns. Built Random Forest models (R² 0.43–0.65) of meteorological and environmental drivers, and developed a Land Suitability Index identifying 34,476 km² of high-potential, low-adoption areas to target subsidy interventions.

Pythonscikit-learngeopandasArcGIS ProRandom Forest

University of Michigan, Meha Jain Lab · 2023–2025

Download thesis

Field Research · Policy · Food Systems

Natural farming & agrarian distress in Andhra Pradesh

Conducted semi-structured interviews across 7 villages in Kadapa district with 17 APCNF natural farmers and 4 conventional farmers. Applied thematic analysis to identify three key drivers of farmer transition to Zero Budget Natural Farming: CSA community support, chemical health impacts, and improved crop quality. Authored a 40-page policy report for the Director of the Center for Sustainable Agriculture.

R / tidyversePostgreSQLThematic analysisField interviews

University of Texas at Austin · Polymathic Scholars Honors · 2020–2023

Professional experience

Work projects

Remote Sensing

Rice phenology & methane forecasting, Mekong Delta

Used MODIS NDVI time series analysis to generate crop phenology maps across ~80,000 hectares and forecast atmospheric methane emissions tied to flooding and harvest cycles in Vietnam.

RGoogle Earth EngineQGISterra

IRRI, Philippines · 2024

Policy

Federal commercial space data procurement audit

Supported GAO audit of 45+ federal organizations procuring commercial satellite data; findings contributed to FY2026 Congressional procurement recommendations on geospatial data policy.

Stakeholder interviewsExcelFederal audit methods

GAO, Oakland · 2025

Urban Tech

Transit data expert, Google Maps (SF)

Working with Cognizant as a city transit expert for Google Maps, contributing local knowledge and data quality to improve transit routing and coverage for San Francisco commuters.

About

Science, data, and the land

I'm a geospatial data scientist with an M.S. in Environment & Sustainability from the University of Michigan, where I was a Transformative Food Systems Fellow. My work sits at the intersection of remote sensing, machine learning, and sustainable agriculture — translating satellite and field data into insights that help farmers, policymakers, and technologists make better decisions for people and planet.


I speak English, Telugu, and Spanish, and have conducted field research in India and Vietnam.
